understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, complete each level by matching the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation to the requirements of goal cells, and then stepping onto those goal cells. All goals in a level must be completed to advance to the next level, and all levels must be won to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina. When stamina reaches 0, a life is lost and stamina resets to maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Movement is blocked by walls, indicated by 'blocked_directions' in the state. Stepping on modifier tiles cycles the piece's shape (0-5), color (orange -> blue -> green -> red -> orange), or rotates it 90° clockwise (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). A goal cell activates only when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements simultaneously. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. The grid contains walls (#), floors (.), shape changers (white diagonal pattern), color changers (2x2 colored blocks), rotation changers (white arrow pattern), and stamina refills (hollow yellow ring). Players must plan routes to reach modifier tiles and goals while managing stamina and avoiding walls.
